thread.title: Putin vows more tests of nuke-capable missile fired at Ukraine | National News | messenger-inquirer.com
thread.title_full: Putin vows more tests of nuke-capable missile fired at Ukraine | National News | messenger-inquirer.com

author: Victoria LUKOVENKO with Sergii VOLSKYI with Florent VERGNES in Dnipro
title: Putin vows more tests of nuke-capable missile fired at Ukraine | National News | messenger-inquirer.com
text:
Russian President Vladimir Putin on Friday promised more combat test-firing of an experimental hypersonic missile launched at Ukraine, as Volodymyr Zelensky appealed for updated air-defence systems to meet the new threat.
The latest statements from the leaders came hours after Ukraine's parliament shut down over heightened fears of a missile attack.
